stemHtml: Which of the following systems are operational SBAS?

options.a: WAAS in the USA, MSAS in Japan, EGNOS in Europe, and GAGAN in India.
options.b: GPS in the USA, MSAS in Japan, Galileo in Europe, and GAGAN in India.
options.c: WAAS in the USA, MSAS in Japan, EGNOS in Europe, and IRNSS in India.
options.d: GPS in the USA, SDCM in Japan, EGNOS in Europe, and GAGAN in India.
